completed_slice: Strengthened the composite Cloudflare deployment evidence validator so HTTPS lookalike domains cannot satisfy Worker or Pages deployment proof.
verification: Three isolated Node 22 cases passed for valid provider hosts, lookalike rejection, and malformed/non-HTTPS rejection. No Cloudflare deployment run was available.

next_action: Run the Cloudflare stack workflow after credentials are configured; verify that returned Worker and Pages URLs satisfy provider-bound hostname, identity, commit, atomicity, redeployment-persistence, and ordering gates.
